Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Erastes]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Erastes is a captain in the Damascan army.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — A soldier was positioned behind Erastes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Erastes has gray eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Erastes lay with his armor stripped away and his hands and feet bound with ropes.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Erastes has iron-gray hair and eyes that look like they were carved from steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Erastes was sitting next to Chaka and munching on a red piece of fruit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Erastes was a member of the Damascan army.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Erastes is an iron-haired captain.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Olissa tried to get Erastes to be a guardian, but he turned her down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Erastes is fighting Benson in the skeleton's basement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Erastes is a Damascan soldier with iron-gray hair and cold eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Erastes has black chains printed on his arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Erastes is a Valinhall Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Erastes ran forward to help during the Incarnation's attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Erastes was present during the encounter with the Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Erastes wears chain mail and wields a Tartarus steel sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Erastes is an old soldier in Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Erastes is present and readying his sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Erastes is part of a group intended to separate enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Erastes refers to Leah as the Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Erastes is waiting on the far side of the building.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Erastes pulled the crimson Ragnarus blade from the Incarnation's body.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
